titleStmt.title: SII 26.662: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 662. (A.R. No. 620A of 1909.) TIRUCHCHIRAI, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Vikramachōḷadēva: Year 9, Siṅga (Āvaṇi) ba. 5, Monday, Aśvati = 1126 A.D., August 10. The week-day was Tuesday.

summary.p: This inscription records that the assembly of Vāṉavanmādēvich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a Brahmadēyam in Śēṟṟūr-kūṟṟam in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, sold to the temple of the god Tiruchchenneṟiyuḍaiya-mahādēvar of the place a land measuring 3-3/8 mā in extent and a kitchen-garden measuring 1-3/4 mā in extent for a sum of 13-1/4 kāśu and made it tax-free.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻadevaṟku
yāṇṭu Oṉpatāvatu siṅhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu pañcamiyun tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvatināḷ kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭuc ceṟṟūr kūṟṟattu brahmadeyam vāṉavaṉmāteviccaturve
timaṅkalattu nampimāruḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom nilavilaiyāvaṇa minnāṭṭu brahmadeyam rājasun=tariccaturvvetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruccenneṟiyuṭaiya mahā
devar koyilil śrīmāhEśvarakkaṇkāṇipiḷḷaiyaṭiyāṟkum tevakanmikaḷukkum nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷūr
ṭattu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpārkkellai paṭṭaip piṭāri naṅkaik koyilininṟum vaṭakku nokkip pokiṟa Ūroḻukkaikku meṟkum tenpārkkellai Ittiruccenneṟi Uṭaiya
[mahā]devar Iṟaiyili viḷainilattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai Innāyanāriṟaiyili viḷainilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai kulottuṅkacoḻanallūrukku nirpāyakkalvina
ṟkum Āka Ivvicainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭup parivattaṉaiyāl sabhai- yomutāyirunta viḷainila munṟumākkāṇiyaraikkāṇikku nilamunṟumākkāṇiyaraikkāṇiyum Itan teṟku sa
bhaiyomutāyirunta puncey nilam Orumāmukkāṇiyum Āka viḷainilamuṅ kollaiyumāka nilaṅkāleyaraikkāṇiyum Ittiruccenneṟi mahādevar tirunāmattile kā
ṇiyāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷanṟāṭu naṟkācu 2 vīcam Ikkācu Iraṇṭeyaraikkālum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccelavaṟakkoṇṭu Innāyanār tirunāmattu
viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Ivvāṉavanmāteviccaturveti- maṅkalattu nampiyāruḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom Ivviḷainilam munṟumāk
kāṇiyaraikkāṇiyum kollai nilamorumāmukkāṇiyum Ittiruccenneṟiyuṭaiyār tirunāmattile Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttu Ivvānavanmātevic caturvetimaṅkalattu nampimāruḷḷi
ṭṭa mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom Ivviḷainilam munṟu mākkāṇiyaraikkāṇiyum kollai nilamorumā mukkāṇiyum Ittiruc cenneṟiyuṭaiyār nirunāmattile Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttu Ivvāṉavanmātevic
caturvetimaṅkalattu nampimāruḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom Ittevar tevakanmikaḷum śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇipiḷḷaiyaṭiyāruṅ kaivaḻi koṇṭa kācu 10 3(1/4) Ikkācu patinmunṟekālu māvaṇakkaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccelavaṟak
koṇṭu cantrādittavaṟ śāśvatikamāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom nampipperumakkaḷuḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyom ..
Digital edition of SII 26.662 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
